Home / Careers
We're Hiring

Build the operating systems
ambitious businesses run on.

COREX is a small, focused team delivering high-impact operational transformation. We work on interesting problems, with ambitious clients, and we hold each other to a high standard.

How We Work

What you'll find
working at COREX.

🎯

Outcome-First Culture

We care about what gets done, not how many hours it took. Delivery, impact, and client results are what matter.

🔬

Real Problems, Real Work

No busy work. No PowerPoint theatre. Every project is hands-on, real-world delivery that creates measurable business impact.

📈

Growth Without Nonsense

We're growing fast and we're deliberate about who we hire. You'll have room to own your domain and shape how we do things.

🤖

AI-Native Team

We use AI tools in our own workflow every day. If you're curious about AI and want to build with it professionally, you'll fit in.

🌍

Remote-Friendly

We're based in Ireland but work with clients globally. Many roles are remote-first with occasional client visits.

🏆

High Standards

We hold ourselves to a high standard. 96.8% on-scope delivery rate. We only hire people who take that seriously.

Open Positions

Current openings.

We hire for character and capability first, industry experience second. If you're sharp, delivery-focused, and want to work on genuinely interesting problems, let's talk.

Operations
Operations Consultant
Remote / Ireland · Full-Time

Lead operational transformation engagements from assessment through implementation. You'll manage client relationships, design operating models, and build the systems that make businesses run better.

Apply Now
Technology
Automation & Integration Specialist
Remote · Full-Time or Contract

Build and maintain automation workflows across Zapier, Make, HubSpot, and custom API integrations. You'll be hands-on with client systems, designing the technical layer of our operational solutions.

Apply Now
AI & Technology
AI Implementation Specialist
Remote · Full-Time

Design and deploy AI workflows for client operations. Working primarily with Anthropic's Claude and connected automation tools, you'll build real AI solutions that handle production workloads.

Apply Now
General
Speculative Application
Remote / Ireland · All levels

Don't see the right role? We're always interested in sharp people who care about operational excellence. Send us a note about what you're great at and what you'd want to do.

Get in Touch
Small Team · High Impact · Real Work

Think you'd be
a good fit?

Tell us about yourself and what you want to build. We'll get back to you quickly - we don't do slow, bureaucratic hiring processes.

Send Us a Message
